description: Concurrent Function Modification: Both branches modify the same function body with different but compatible logic (e.g., one adds validation, other adds logging). Agent must synthesize both changes.

git_log_ours: aaa1234 Add input validation to create_user
git_log_theirs: ccc9abc Add structured logging to UserService
ddddef0 Add error handling with logging in create_user

test_suite.test_logging_present:
def test_logging_present():
    """Verify that logging calls are present in the code."""
    import inspect
    source = inspect.getsource(UserService.create_user)
    has_logging = "logger.info" in source or "logger.error" in source
    return has_logging

git_log_ours: eee1111 Add in-memory cache to GET requests
fff2222 Set 60-second TTL on cache entries
git_log_theirs: ggg3333 Add retry logic with exponential backoff
hhh4444 Handle ConnectionError in GET requests

test_suite.test_get_basic:
def test_get_basic():
    client = APIClient("https://api.example.com")
    result = client.get("users")
    assert result["status"] == 200
    return True
test_suite.test_cache_hit:
def test_cache_hit():
    client = APIClient("https://api.example.com")
    r1 = client.get("users")
    r2 = client.get("users")
    assert r1 == r2
    # Second call should use cache
    has_cache = hasattr(client, "_cache")
    return has_cache
test_suite.test_retry_on_error:
def test_retry_on_error():
    """Check that retry logic exists in source."""
    import inspect
    source = inspect.getsource(APIClient.get)
    has_retry = "max_retries" in source or "attempt" in source
    return has_retry

git_log_theirs: jjj6666 Add filtering support to DataStore.query

test_suite.test_insert_and_query:
def test_insert_and_query():
    store = DataStore()
    store.insert("users", {"name": "Alice", "age": 30})
    result = store.query("users")
    assert len(result["data"]) == 1
    return True
test_suite.test_pagination:
def test_pagination():
    store = DataStore()
    for i in range(25):
        store.insert("items", {"id": i})
    result = store.query("items", page=2, page_size=10)
    assert len(result["data"]) == 10
    assert result["page"] == 2
    return True
test_suite.test_filtering:
def test_filtering():
    store = DataStore()
    store.insert("users", {"name": "Alice", "role": "admin"})
    store.insert("users", {"name": "Bob", "role": "user"})
    result = store.query("users", filters={"role": "admin"})
    assert len(result["data"]) == 1
    assert result["data"][0]["name"] == "Alice"
    return True
